# Demonstrates the per-shedding-store dynamic verbose logging promotion at
# vmodule=0 (default operator view): per-range messages stay silent unless
# the store has been overloaded for >= persistentOverloadThreshold (30min)
# and hasn't had a detailed-log burst within detailedLogInterval (10min).

include path=rebalance_stores_cpu_replica_include.txt
----
ok

# Move past the lease shedding grace period (include leaves us at t=5m).
tick seconds=300
----
t=10m0s

# t=10m: overloadDur < 30min, detailedLog=false. Only always-Infof entries
# are captured (sorted shedding stores, result, pass summary).
rebalance-stores store-id=1 max-range-move-count=1 fraction-pending-decrease-threshold=1.0 vmodule=0
----
[mmaid=2] sorted shedding stores: (s3: overloadUrgent)
[mmaid=2] result(success): rebalancing r3 from s3 to s4 [change: r3=[change_replicas=[{ADD_VOTER n4,s4} {REMOVE_VOTER n3,s3}] cids=1,2]] with resulting loads source: [cpu:900ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] target: [cpu:210ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B]
[mmaid=2] rebalancing pass summary [local=s1]:
	overloaded:
		long: [s3]
	success: [s3]
pending(2)
change-id=1 store-id=4 node-id=4 range-id=3 load-delta=[cpu:110ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=10m0s gc=15m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)
change-id=2 store-id=3 node-id=3 range-id=3 load-delta=[cpu:-100ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=10m0s gc=15m0s
  prev=(replica-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)

# Pending changes from t=10m have gc=15m, so they stay until then.
gc-pending-changes
----
pending(2)
change-id=1 store-id=4 node-id=4 range-id=3 load-delta=[cpu:110ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=10m0s gc=15m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)
change-id=2 store-id=3 node-id=3 range-id=3 load-delta=[cpu:-100ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=10m0s gc=15m0s
  prev=(replica-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)

# t=40m: overloadDur >= 30min and no prior burst, so detailedLog=true for s3.
# Per-range messages are promoted to Infof and appear in the captured log.
tick seconds=1800
----
t=40m0s

rebalance-stores store-id=1 max-range-move-count=1 fraction-pending-decrease-threshold=1.0 vmodule=0
----
[mmaid=3] sorted shedding stores: (s3: overloadSlow)
[mmaid=3] start processing shedding store s3: cpu node load overloadSlow, store load overloadSlow, worst dim CPURate
[mmaid=3] top-K[CPURate] ranges for s3 with lease on local s1: r3:[cpu:100ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] r2:[cpu:100ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] r1:[cpu:100ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B]
[mmaid=3] attempting to shed replicas next
[mmaid=3] skipping r3: has pending changes
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=CPURate (s3): overloadSlow, reason: load is >10% above mean [load=900 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=90.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=WriteBandwidth (s3): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=ByteSize (s3): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=CPURate (n3): overloadSlow, reason: load is >10% above mean [load=900 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=90.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=CPURate (s4): loadLow, reason: load is >10% below mean [load=210 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=21.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=WriteBandwidth (s4): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=ByteSize (s4): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=CPURate (n4): loadLow, reason: load is >10% below mean [load=210 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=21.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] considering replica-transfer r2 from s3: store load [cpu:900ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B]
[mmaid=3] candidates for r2:
	s4: (store=loadNormal worst=WriteBandwidth cpu=loadLow writes=loadNormal bytes=loadNormal node=loadLow frac_pending=1.10,0.00(false))
[mmaid=3] using level only consider targets <= load threshold (threshold:overloadSlow) for r2 based on overload duration 40m0s
[mmaid=3] candidate store 4 was discarded due to (nls=false overloadDim=false pending_thresh=true): sls=(store=loadNormal worst=WriteBandwidth cpu=loadLow writes=loadNormal bytes=loadNormal node=loadLow frac_pending=1.10,0.00(false))
[mmaid=3] sortTargetCandidateSetAndPick: no candidates due to load
[mmaid=3] result(failed): no suitable target found among candidates for r2 (threshold overloadSlow; only consider targets <= load threshold)
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=CPURate (s3): overloadSlow, reason: load is >10% above mean [load=900 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=90.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=WriteBandwidth (s3): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=ByteSize (s3): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=CPURate (n3): overloadSlow, reason: load is >10% above mean [load=900 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=90.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=CPURate (s4): loadLow, reason: load is >10% below mean [load=210 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=21.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=WriteBandwidth (s4): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=ByteSize (s4): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] load summary for dim=CPURate (n4): loadLow, reason: load is >10% below mean [load=210 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=21.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=3] considering replica-transfer r1 from s3: store load [cpu:900ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B]
[mmaid=3] candidates for r1:
	s4: (store=loadNormal worst=WriteBandwidth cpu=loadLow writes=loadNormal bytes=loadNormal node=loadLow frac_pending=1.10,0.00(false))
[mmaid=3] using level only consider targets <= load threshold (threshold:overloadSlow) for r1 based on overload duration 40m0s
[mmaid=3] candidate store 4 was discarded due to (nls=false overloadDim=false pending_thresh=true): sls=(store=loadNormal worst=WriteBandwidth cpu=loadLow writes=loadNormal bytes=loadNormal node=loadLow frac_pending=1.10,0.00(false))
[mmaid=3] sortTargetCandidateSetAndPick: no candidates due to load
[mmaid=3] result(failed): no suitable target found among candidates for r1 (threshold overloadSlow; only consider targets <= load threshold)
[mmaid=3] rebalancing pass summary [local=s1]:
	overloaded:
		long: [s3]
	failure: [{s3, total: 3, no-cand-load:2, range-transient:1}]
pending(2)
change-id=1 store-id=4 node-id=4 range-id=3 load-delta=[cpu:110ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=10m0s gc=15m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)
change-id=2 store-id=3 node-id=3 range-id=3 load-delta=[cpu:-100ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=10m0s gc=15m0s
  prev=(replica-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)

# t=45m: 5min after the last burst, less than detailedLogInterval(10min), so
# detailedLog=false again. Captured log shrinks back.
gc-pending-changes
----
pending(0)

tick seconds=300
----
t=45m0s

rebalance-stores store-id=1 max-range-move-count=1 fraction-pending-decrease-threshold=1.0 vmodule=0
----
[mmaid=4] sorted shedding stores: (s3: overloadUrgent)
[mmaid=4] result(success): rebalancing r3 from s3 to s4 [change: r3=[change_replicas=[{ADD_VOTER n4,s4} {REMOVE_VOTER n3,s3}] cids=3,4]] with resulting loads source: [cpu:900ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] target: [cpu:210ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B]
[mmaid=4] rebalancing pass summary [local=s1]:
	overloaded:
		long: [s3]
	success: [s3]
pending(2)
change-id=3 store-id=4 node-id=4 range-id=3 load-delta=[cpu:110ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=45m0s gc=50m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)
change-id=4 store-id=3 node-id=3 range-id=3 load-delta=[cpu:-100ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=45m0s gc=50m0s
  prev=(replica-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)

# t=56m: 16min after the last burst, past detailedLogInterval(10min), so the
# next burst fires. detailedLog=true again, per-range Infof returns.
gc-pending-changes
----
pending(2)
change-id=3 store-id=4 node-id=4 range-id=3 load-delta=[cpu:110ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=45m0s gc=50m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)
change-id=4 store-id=3 node-id=3 range-id=3 load-delta=[cpu:-100ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=45m0s gc=50m0s
  prev=(replica-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)

tick seconds=660
----
t=56m0s

rebalance-stores store-id=1 max-range-move-count=1 fraction-pending-decrease-threshold=1.0 vmodule=0
----
[mmaid=5] sorted shedding stores: (s3: overloadSlow)
[mmaid=5] start processing shedding store s3: cpu node load overloadSlow, store load overloadSlow, worst dim CPURate
[mmaid=5] top-K[CPURate] ranges for s3 with lease on local s1: r3:[cpu:100ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] r2:[cpu:100ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] r1:[cpu:100ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B]
[mmaid=5] attempting to shed replicas next
[mmaid=5] skipping r3: has pending changes
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=CPURate (s3): overloadSlow, reason: load is >10% above mean [load=900 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=90.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=WriteBandwidth (s3): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=ByteSize (s3): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=CPURate (n3): overloadSlow, reason: load is >10% above mean [load=900 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=90.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=CPURate (s4): loadLow, reason: load is >10% below mean [load=210 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=21.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=WriteBandwidth (s4): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=ByteSize (s4): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=CPURate (n4): loadLow, reason: load is >10% below mean [load=210 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=21.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] considering replica-transfer r2 from s3: store load [cpu:900ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B]
[mmaid=5] candidates for r2:
	s4: (store=loadNormal worst=WriteBandwidth cpu=loadLow writes=loadNormal bytes=loadNormal node=loadLow frac_pending=1.10,0.00(false))
[mmaid=5] using level only consider targets <= load threshold (threshold:overloadSlow) for r2 based on overload duration 56m0s
[mmaid=5] candidate store 4 was discarded due to (nls=false overloadDim=false pending_thresh=true): sls=(store=loadNormal worst=WriteBandwidth cpu=loadLow writes=loadNormal bytes=loadNormal node=loadLow frac_pending=1.10,0.00(false))
[mmaid=5] sortTargetCandidateSetAndPick: no candidates due to load
[mmaid=5] result(failed): no suitable target found among candidates for r2 (threshold overloadSlow; only consider targets <= load threshold)
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=CPURate (s3): overloadSlow, reason: load is >10% above mean [load=900 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=90.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=WriteBandwidth (s3): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=ByteSize (s3): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=CPURate (n3): overloadSlow, reason: load is >10% above mean [load=900 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=90.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=CPURate (s4): loadLow, reason: load is >10% below mean [load=210 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=21.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=WriteBandwidth (s4): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=ByteSize (s4): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00%* meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] load summary for dim=CPURate (n4): loadLow, reason: load is >10% below mean [load=210 meanLoad=525 fractionUsed=21.00% meanUtil=52.50% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=5] considering replica-transfer r1 from s3: store load [cpu:900ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B]
[mmaid=5] candidates for r1:
	s4: (store=loadNormal worst=WriteBandwidth cpu=loadLow writes=loadNormal bytes=loadNormal node=loadLow frac_pending=1.10,0.00(false))
[mmaid=5] using level only consider targets <= load threshold (threshold:overloadSlow) for r1 based on overload duration 56m0s
[mmaid=5] candidate store 4 was discarded due to (nls=false overloadDim=false pending_thresh=true): sls=(store=loadNormal worst=WriteBandwidth cpu=loadLow writes=loadNormal bytes=loadNormal node=loadLow frac_pending=1.10,0.00(false))
[mmaid=5] sortTargetCandidateSetAndPick: no candidates due to load
[mmaid=5] result(failed): no suitable target found among candidates for r1 (threshold overloadSlow; only consider targets <= load threshold)
[mmaid=5] rebalancing pass summary [local=s1]:
	overloaded:
		long: [s3]
	failure: [{s3, total: 3, no-cand-load:2, range-transient:1}]
pending(2)
change-id=3 store-id=4 node-id=4 range-id=3 load-delta=[cpu:110ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=45m0s gc=50m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)
